errors.description: The signed bundle timestamp attachment is missing or cannot be verified.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness until a signed timestamp attachment verifies

errors.description: The timestamp message imprint is malformed or not bound to the signed bundle hash.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when message imprint integrity is ambiguous

errors.description: The TSA policy identifier is missing, malformed, or not the expected policy.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when TSA policy identity does not match

errors.description: The TSA generation time or verification metadata is stale, malformed, or outside the freshness window.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when timestamp freshness cannot be proven

errors.description: The timestamp token hash or deterministic verification hash binding does not match.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when timestamp signature hash metadata mismatches

errors.description: The local-only live verification output path is mutable or not content-addressed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when output paths are mutable

errors.description: The TSA live verification diagnostics contain unsafe or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny TSA live verification readiness when diagnostics are not redacted
